topic.title: Performing the maintenance tasks
topic.para: Perform your maintenance tasks on the cluster services or infrastructure. This could be changes to the configuration of the cluster services, or to the underlying storage or networking that the cluster services rely on.

Perform your maintenance tasks on the application or service that the resource represents. This could be updating a virtual machine, reconfiguring a file system, or manually restarting an application, for example.

warning.title: Don't shut down or reboot cluster nodes
warning.para: In this workflow, don't shut down or reboot any cluster nodes. The resources aren't highly available while in maintenance mode, so they won't fail over to another node.

topic.para: Perform your maintenance tasks on the cluster node. This could be hardware, software or firmware updates, for example. In this workflow, you can safely shut down or reboot the node if required.

important.title: Only make changes to one node at a time
important.para: Don't make changes to more than one node at once. If you need to make changes to other nodes, wait until this node is online in the cluster again before repeating this workflow on the next node.
